instruction.title: Assistant Instruction
instruction.tooltip: The system instructions that the assistant uses. The maximum length is 32768 characters.
instruction.placeholder: You are a personal math tutor. When asked a question, write and run Python code to answer the question.

temperature.title: Assistant Temperature
temperature.tooltip: Controls randomness: Lowering results in less random completions. As the temperature approaches zero, the model will become deterministic and repetitive.

topP.title: Assistant Top P
topP.tooltip: Controls diversity via nucleus sampling: 0.5 means half of all likelihood-weighted options are considered.

tools.title: Assistant Tools
tools.tooltip: A list of tool enabled on the assistant. There can be a maximum of 128 tools per assistant.

codeInterpreterFiles.title: Code Interpreter Files
codeInterpreterFiles.tooltip: Code Interpreter enables the assistant to write and run code. This tool can process files with diverse data and formatting, and generate files such as graphs

fileSearchFiles.title: File Search Files
fileSearchFiles.tooltip: File search enables the assistant with knowledge from files that you or your users upload. Once a file is uploaded, the assistant automatically decides when to retrieve content based on user requests

docstore.title: Document Store
docstore.discription: Store and upsert documents for LLM retrieval (RAG)
docstore.deleteNote: Note: Without a Record Manager configured, only the document chunks will be removed from the document store. The actual vector embeddings in your vector store database will remain unchanged. To enable automatic cleanup of vector store data, please configure a Record Manager. Learn more
docstore.apiNote: With the Upsert API, you can choose an existing document and reuse the same configuration for upserting.
docstore.refresh: Some files are pending processing. Please Refresh to get the latest status.
docstore.embeddingsDescription: Configure Embeddings, Vector Store and Record Manager
docstore.recordManagerUnavailable: Record Manager is not applicable for selected Vector Store
docstore.retrievalPlaygroundDescription: Retrieval Playground - Test your vector store retrieval settings

confirm.title: Refresh all loaders and upsert all chunks?
confirm.description: This will re-process all loaders and upsert all chunks. This action might take some time.

loader.simple: Delete {{name}}? This will delete all the associated document chunks from the document store.
loader.withData: Delete {{name}}? This will delete all the associated document chunks from the document store and remove the actual data from the vector store database.

store.simple: Delete Store {{name}}? This will delete all the associated loaders and document chunks from the document store.
store.withData: Delete Store {{name}}? This will delete all the associated loaders and document chunks from the document store, and remove the actual data from the vector store database.

document.simple: Delete store [{{name}}]? This will remove this document store from the list.
document.withData: Delete store [{{name}}]? This will remove this document store from the list and remove the actual data from the vector store database.

menu.refresh: Re-process all loaders and upsert all chunks
